subcodes.first_line: This is the Book from Him Who hath been imprisoned in the path of God, the Almighty, the Glorious, the All-Bountiful, unto him who hath believed in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الذی حبس فی سبیل الله المقتدر العزیز الوهاب لمن آمن بالله و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @universal peace; world unity
